reconciliation_note: Manual reconciliation 2026-06-24, post-merge of claude/latent-usefulness-v08 (eval/qrels branch) into claude/neuronpedia-foundation (KG/claims/vault/frontend branch). data/corpus/normalized/combined_corpus.jsonl is a directory; the live corpus file is full_corpus_v09.jsonl inside it. Unique IDs counted via source_id field (7,121); dataset_id field has only 625 unique values (embedded-slice only). No build_artifact_manifest.py script exists in the repo despite being referenced by docs/REPRODUCIBILITY_CAPSULE.md — this file is still hand-maintained; writing that script is queued as backlog, not done in this pass.

corpus.id_field_note: source_id is the canonical unique identifier (7,121 unique). dataset_id has 625 unique values — covers the embedded/indexed slice only.

knowledge_graph.note: Full-corpus graph. 7,593 nodes / 31,920 edges as cited in whitepaper.

field_state_adjudicated.status: smoke-test only — adjudication workflow verified but not at benchmark scale

canonical_llm_silver.status: merged 2026-06-23 from claude/latent-usefulness-v08 — single LLM-judge pass, not human-adjudicated. First non-degenerate ablation ladder this project has produced (see ablation_ladder below). Dual-judge reliability not yet estimable (no pair has two non-error judge labels).

honest_caveats: hybrid_graph/full's NDCG@10 lead over plain bm25 is within bootstrap-CI overlap, not yet statistically established at n=317 queries
dense_bge underperforming bm25 IS a real, CI-separated negative result (no overlap) worth investigating before citing as a flat claim
all rungs are evaluated on LLM-silver qrels, not human-adjudicated gold

relationship_edge_quality.md shows the typed/relationship KG edges sit at ~0.50 helpful rate (close to coin-flip) among judged top-10 promotions, predating the 2026-06-23 Phase 6b qualified-consensus edge types

vector_index.note: turbovec index covers 625-record embedded slice; full 7,171-record rebuild needed before expanded-corpus retrieval claims

literature.findings_file_note: 144MB+ and growing — gitignored as of 2026-06-23, do not commit (exceeds GitHub's 100MB hard limit)
literature.findings_note: 190,279 findings from 255,940/255,940 papers in the checkpoint as of 2026-06-23 19:09 PDT (74.4% yield) — checkpoint count equals total ingested papers, so this run may be at or near completion; not independently confirmed. Quality not validated at this scale — manual audit template at reports/eval/finding_audit_template.csv is still blank. A 100-sample LLM-judge pass (reports/eval/finding_audit_llm_judge_summary.md) found 88% strict / 92% weighted precision on an earlier extraction snapshot, with dominant errors in result_direction and species — both fields feed directly into the typed-field contradiction_subtype logic, so audit before further relationship-mining at this larger scale.

stale_reports.issue: claims corpus_size=10404 and treats combined_corpus.jsonl as a file; conflicts with 7,171-row v09 reality
corpus load failed because path is a directory; diagnostics need corpus path updated to full_corpus_v09.jsonl
claims 675 annotated pairs; actual adjudicated_qrels.jsonl has 3 rows; treat as stale historical artifact
based on 8 LLM-qrels pairs over 1 query; engineering diagnostic only
points to /tmp/pytest path; 701 nodes / 1 edge; test artifact — not production state

source_of_truth_summary.canonical_llm_silver_qrels: data/qrels/qrels.canonical.jsonl — 13,654 pairs / 317 queries (single LLM judge, first non-degenerate ablation ladder; see ablation_ladder above)
